code: import _objectSpread from"C:/Users/winif/OneDrive/Desktop/react_learn/node_modules/@babel/runtime/helpers/esm/objectSpread2.js";import{createAsyncThunk,createSlice}from'@reduxjs/toolkit';export const fetchPosts=createAsyncThunk('posts/fetchPosts',async()=>{const response=await fetch('https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts');if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Failed to fetch posts');}return response.json();});const postsSlice=createSlice({name:'posts',initialState:{posts:[],loading:false,error:null},reducers:{},extraReducers:builder=>{builder.addCase(fetchPosts.pending,state=>{state.loading=true;state.error=null;}).addCase(fetchPosts.fulfilled,(state,action)=>{state.loading=false;state.posts=action.payload;}).addCase(fetchPosts.rejected,(state,action)=>{state.loading=false;state.error=action.error.message;});}});export default postsSlice.reducer;export const selectPostsWithAuthors=state=>{const usersMap=Object.fromEntries(state.users.users.map(user=>[user.id,user.name]));return state.posts.posts.map(p=>_objectSpread(_objectSpread({},p),{},{author:usersMap[p.userId]||'Unknown'}));};
